extract: Thunder Punch (Japanese: かみなりパンチ Thunder Punch), formatted as ThunderPunch prior to Pokémon X and Y, is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM41 in Generation II. TM23 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM05 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM068 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM023 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Ice Punch and Fire Punch, having similar names and effects.
